title: Treasury Operations / Cash Management (Kyriba)
description:
Hands-on treasury operations role responsible for daily cash management, payments execution, and bank account administration, with strong involvement in Kyriba implementation and BAU operations. Acts as a working-level contact with banks on KYC, AML, and sanctions-related queries.

Key Responsibilities

  • Daily cash monitoring, cash reporting, and intercompany transfers
  • Payment processing and exception handling via Kyriba
  • Bank account opening/closure and KYC documentation management
  • Liaison with banks on sanctions screening issues and payment holds
  • Support Kyriba implementation, UAT, go-live, and system support
  • Maintain treasury controls, documentation, and audit support


Requirements

  • Minimum 4 years’ experience in treasury operations or cash management
  • Hands-on Kyriba implementation and operations experience
  • Practical exposure to bank KYC and sanctions-related bank interactions
  • Detail-oriented with strong follow-through and communication skills


Please email your cv directly in word format to sindhu@theedgepartnership.com .

 
 Please note that due to the high number of applications only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We regret to inform you that your application for this position was unsuccessful if you do not hear from us in the next 5 business days. 


EA License: 16S8131 
Recruiter License: R1981753

postedCompany.description:
We are The Edge

Whether it’s a start-up, a local conglomerate, an international bank or an MNC, our goal is single-minded – to provide clients with the competitive edge needed to source key talents across all aspects of their business. Combined, our partners have over 30 years of experience in sourcing global talent for businesses in Asia.

We partner with those companies and individuals that understand and treasure the value of working closely with their recruitment partners, creating a relationship based upon trust, mutual respect and professionalism.

We offer the leading edge in…

  • developing opportunities for candidates and clients alike across the competitive Asian employment landscape.
  • delivering career opportunities, career management, responsiveness and service levels.
  • creating innovative, imaginative and sometimes unconventional solutions to support our clients’ requirements.
  • providing an internationally-linked market leading database and world class IT support.

We specialize in

  • Banking & Financial Services
  • Commerce & Industry
  • Sales & Marketing
  • Human Resources
  • Information Technology
  • Supply Chain Management

http://theedgeinasia.com/
